acrostic: INITIAL FALL, CALLING ABRAHAM, ISAAC TO JACOB, JOSEPH IN EGYPT

1.acrostic: IN THE BEGINNING GOD FORMED THE WORLD

2.acrostic: NAP, THEN GOD MADE MAN AND WOMAN

4.acrostic: THE LORD ACCEPTED ABEL NOT CAIN

5.acrostic: INCLUDES ALL FATHERS FROM ADAM TO NOAH

7.acrostic: LOADING THE ARK AND THE FLOOD

9.acrostic: A RAINBOW IS THE SIGN, THEN NOAH DIES

10.acrostic: LOCATIONS WHERE THE SONS OF NOAH LIVED

11.acrostic: LEFT BABEL, AND SHEM'S LINE LEAD TO ABRAM

14.acrostic: LOT IS CAPTURED, ABE FREES HIM

18.acrostic: GOD APPEARS AS MEN, SODOM'S DOOM FORETOLD

23.acrostic: HE BURIED SARAH IN A CAVE

32.acrostic: ON THE FORD JABBOK HE WRESTLED WITH GOD

33.acrostic: JACOB SAW ESAU RUN TO HIM

34.acrostic: AND SIMEON AND LEVI TOOK THEIR SWORDS

35.acrostic: CHANGE GARMENTS AND GO UP TO BETHEL

37.acrostic: BROTHERS HATED JOSEPH AND SOLD HIM TO EGYPT

38.acrostic: JUDAH SLEPT WITH HIS SONS WIFE TAMAR

41.acrostic: EGYPT AND ALL LANDS CAME TO BUY GRAIN FROM JOSEPH AS FAMINE WAS SEVERE

42.acrostic: PERHAPS WE ARE GUILTY CONCERNING OUR BROTHER

43.acrostic: HE SET A FEAST BEFORE THEM IN HIS NEW HOUSE

44.acrostic: IN THE SACK OF BENJAMIN WAS THE SILVER CUP

46.acrostic: EGYPT JACOB CAME WITH ALL HIS OFFSPRINGS

49.acrostic: PARTING BLESSING TO JACOB'S SONS, BURIAL
